query:
UPDATE goals SET currentValue = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE status = 'approved') WHERE id = 1 AND category = 'vendas';
SELECT id, category, targetValue, currentValue FROM goals WHERE category = 'vendas';
